fields.summary: Refactor TestPBImplRecords so that we can reuse for testing protocol records in other YARN modules
Enable YARN RM scale out via federation using multiple RM's

status.description: A resolution has been taken, and it is awaiting verification by reporter. From here issues are either reopened, or are closed.
status.name: Resolved

issuetype.description: A new feature of the product, which has yet to be developed.
issuetype.name: New Feature

fields.description: The {{TestPBImplRecords}} has generic helper methods to validate YARN api records. This JIRA proposes to refactor the generic helper methods into a base class that can then be reused by other YARN modules for testing internal API protocol records like in yarn-server-common for Federation (YARN-2915).

resolution.description: A fix for this issue is checked into the tree and tested.
resolution.name: Fixed

comments.body: Attaching a simple patch that refactor the generic helper methods in {{TestPBImplRecords}} into a base class.
